articles.title: U.S. 3-Month T‑Bill Yield Inches Higher to 3.635% in Latest Auction
articles.expand: The yield on the U.S. 3‑month Treasury bill ticked up slightly in the latest auction, rising to 3.635% from the previous 3.620%. The updated figure, as of 06 April 2026, signals a modest increase in short-term borrowing costs for the U.S. government. While the move is small in absolute terms, incremental changes in T‑bill yields are closely watched...
